stemHtml: What is the effect of body temperature on the quality of sleep?

options.a: Sleeping during the phase of high body temperature improves the physical and mental performance.
options.b: The effect of body temperature on sleep is marginal, as long as the pilot can sleep for at least 6 hours.
options.c: Pilots should preferably go to sleep when the body temperature starts to rise.
options.d: Sleep is most restful during phases of falling and low body temperature.
